items.title: Meta settles closely watched school district lawsuit weeks ahead of trial
items.summary: Meta settled a highly-watched school district lawsuit, but still faces many more.

items.title: Bungie gives up on Destiny
items.summary: Bungie is moving on from Destiny 2. The studio announced Thursday that it's releasing the last major update for the game on June 9th as its focus "turns towards a new beginning...
